name: pi-island
description_en: Dynamic-Island-style status capsule for the pi coding agent on macOS and Windows. Shows what pi is doing in real time, at the very top of your screen — with native notch-wrap support for MacBooks.
description_zh: Pi 编码代理在 macOS 和 Windows 上的动态岛风格状态胶囊。实时显示 pi 在做什么，位于屏幕最上方 - 支持 MacBook 的原生缺口环绕
